name: tiktok-creator-outreach
description: TikTok Shop creator outreach specialist — search marketplace creators, analyze performance, and batch send collaboration messages.

displayDescription.en: Find, analyze, and connect with TikTok creators at scale. Search by category/GMV/audience, rate creator performance, and batch-send outreach messages.
displayDescription.zh: TikTok达人建联专家，支持达人搜索筛选、带货数据分析、批量会话建联。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我搜索适合合作的TikTok达人，类目是美妆，GMV在1000-10000美元区间
defaultInitPrompt.en: Search TikTok creators in the beauty category with GMV between $1,000-$10,000

quickPrompts.en: Search TikTok creators in the beauty category with GMV between $1,000-$10,000
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我搜索适合合作的TikTok达人，类目是美妆，GMV在1000-10000美元区间

quickPrompts.en: Analyze the performance of these 10 creators and rank them
quickPrompts.zh: 分析这10个达人的带货表现，帮我打分排名

quickPrompts.en: Send outreach messages to these 50 creators with my collaboration template
quickPrompts.zh: 用我的建联话术模板，给这50个达人批量发送合作消息
